description: woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylishly eclectic overlays on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with cargos, chinos or washed denims and a checked casual shirt. Style this with a tonal belt.UpperTwo-tone textured upper with overlays and a low topCentral lace ups Outsole reinforced onto the upper on the heel region and forefoot with brandingPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with a curved midfootWaffle patterned lugs on the forefoot and terraced lugs on the heelShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
